personality: 1 iOS-Native Clean with warm earthy botanical accents
personality_one_liner: A warm, deeply approachable, and structurally clear space that empowers rural women to learn, collaborate, and grow their businesses.

spacing.rule: Generous spacing. Use large tap targets (min 44pt). Use md/lg for internal card padding, xl for screen edges to avoid cramped layouts.

do's: Use frosted glass on the bottom tab bar when content scrolls behind it.
Use frosted glass on sticky headers in scrollable feeds.
Apply glass overlay on featured hero cards over imagery to create depth.
dont's: Do not use glassmorphism on basic list items or form inputs.
Do not use glass if it degrades readability on low-end Android (fallback to solid surfaceSecondary).

screens.name: Auth (Welcome)
screens.purpose: A welcoming entry point emphasizing community and simple Google Auth onboarding.

states.loading: Centered spinner over the background image.
states.error: Error toast with a retry button for Google Auth failure.

screens.layout: Full-screen hero image covering the entire screen (edges). Apply a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to 80% surfaceInverse at the bottom). In the bottom 40%, display a large, welcoming French title ('Ensemble, bâtissons l\'avenir') and subtitle. Place a sticky, full-width Google Auth CTA button at the very bottom, respecting the safe area.

screens.name: Accueil (Opportunities)
screens.purpose: Discover local business opportunities and active community groups.

states.empty: A minimalist plant illustration with text 'Aucune opportunité pour le moment.'
states.error: Message 'Impossible de charger les opportunités' with a 'Réessayer' button.

screens.layout: Single-column scrollable feed. Top section features a prominent Hero Card for the 'Featured Opportunity' (image background + glassmorphism + text). Below it, a list of smaller opportunity cards (surfaceSecondary background, left-aligned text, right-aligned image thumbnail). A sticky FAB in the bottom right for 'Créer un groupe'.

screens.name: Formations
screens.purpose: Library of static training modules on creating and managing small rural businesses.
screens.layout: 2-column grid layout for module cards (`flexWrap: 'wrap'`, `justifyContent: 'space-between'`). Each card uses `surfaceSecondary`, contains a `brandTertiary` icon container with a Phosphor icon (e.g., book, plant, money), a bold title, and a small progress bar showing completion.

screens.name: Financement
screens.purpose: Step-by-step funding request flow leveraging AI to generate a business plan/pitch.

states.loading: Full screen centered spinner with text 'L\'IA rédige votre plan d\'affaires...'
states.error: Message 'La génération a échoué' with a retry button.

screens.layout: Wizard/Form flow. Single column with large inputs. One major question per screen to avoid cognitive overload. Labels sit above inputs. Primary CTA ('Suivant' / 'Générer') is sticky at the bottom inside a KeyboardAvoidingView. The final screen presents the generated AI pitch in a beautifully formatted text card with 'Exporter' and 'Envoyer' actions.

screens.name: Mon Groupe
screens.purpose: Dashboard showing group members, shared projects, and collaborative progress.

states.loading: Skeletons for profile header and members list.
states.empty: Illustration indicating 'Vous n\'êtes dans aucun groupe. Rejoignez-en un!'

screens.layout: Top cover banner (image or brand gradient). Overlapping circular group avatar. Section 1: 'Membres' (horizontal scroll of initials/avatars). Section 2: 'Notre Projet' details in a large `surfaceSecondary` card. Section 3: Recent activity or saved funding requests.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use French for all copy across the app. No hardcoded English text (e.g., use 'Accueil', 'Formations', 'Financement', 'Mon Groupe').

Adhere closely to the WCAG AAA contrast ratios. Ensure that text laid over images (like in the Auth hero screen or Opportunity cards) utilizes the mandatory gradient-to-dark scrim pattern (Layer 1: expo-linear-gradient vertical scrim transparent -> 80% surfaceInverse).
Since the target users are rural with potential tech literacy gaps, keep touch targets large (minimum 44x44pt). Avoid complex gestures; stick to obvious buttons and simple scrolling.
In the 'Financement' step-by-step AI wizard flow, use one question per screen. Keep the primary CTA sticky at the bottom to maintain a smooth, accessible UX.
Utilize 'Plus Jakarta Sans' at font weight 400 and 500 exclusively. Do not use heavier weights. Rely on size for typographic hierarchy.
For avatars or branded entities, use initials inside a brandTertiary circle when actual photos aren't provided. Never use generic user icons.
Never use Indigo, Violet, Purple, or Blue shades. Stick strictly to the warm earthy sage, off-white, and ochre palette provided in the color object.
